title: Union’s 1st XI dominate Cradock in one-sided victory
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Union High Schoo’s first cricket team delivered a strong all-round performance against Cradock High School on Saturday 30 January, after winning the toss and choosing to bat.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Union High Schoo’s first cricket team delivered a strong all-round performance against Cradock High School on Saturday 30 January, after winning the toss and choosing to bat."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The team posted a solid total of 354 in 50 overs, built around a fine unbeaten 136 from Richard Murray."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Captain Yaseen Kazi added a composed 91, while Callum Jacobs’ quick 63 helped Union finish their innings on a positive note.","html":"Captain Yaseen Kazi added a composed 91, while Callum Jacobs’ quick 63 helped Union finish their innings on a positive note."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In reply, Cradock found it tough against a disciplined Union bowling attack and were bowled out for 47.","html":"In reply, Cradock found it tough against a disciplined Union bowling attack and were bowled out for 47."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Yonela Wana impressed with five wickets and Kazi followed up his batting with a tidy spell of five for 18.","html":"Yonela Wana impressed with five wickets and Kazi followed up his batting with a tidy spell of five for 18."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It was a rewarding team effort and a valuable learning experience for everyone involved.","html":"It was a rewarding team effort and a valuable learning experience for everyone involved."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Richard Murray was a deserving man of the match for his outstanding innings.","html":"Richard Murray was a deserving man of the match for his outstanding innings."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Union’s 1st XI dominate Cradock in one-sided victory
